full_text:
Du Wei (Guofu) 杜微 (國輔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Wei (杜微), styledGuofu (國輔), was born in Guanghan. Faked being deaf to avoid serving Shu, but persuaded by Zhuge Liang. Du Wei was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
